name: status
description: Advisory information not important enough to justify an alert -- a status bar or a quiet inline update. APG has no pattern page for it -- confirmed against the pattern index, not assumed -- so ARIA 1.2's role reference is the pattern's source instead. Its implicit politeness is what separates it from alert: a status update queues behind whatever the user is already hearing, an alert does not.

requires.live.politeness: implicit aria-live=polite -- announced without interrupting the user
requires.focus.unaffected: a status update must not receive or move keyboard focus
